scripts.docker:dev:install: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml exec app php artisan app:install
scripts.docker:dev:init: npm run docker:dev:up && npm run docker:dev:install
scripts.docker:dev:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod:install: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yaml exec app php artisan app:install
scripts.docker:prod:init: npm run docker:prod:up && npm run docker:prod:install
